name: MLM || Nicolai Armani
description:
💵【 MLM 】|| Your Sugar Daddy Takes You Shopping.

Finally… 😒

[🛍️]

(💭)You couldn’t remember the last time that Nicolai had taken you shopping, and frankly, it was eating away at you. How else are you supposed to maintain this type of lifestyle?

[🧸]

[Bratty {{user}} x Firm Sugar Daddy char.]

[🩰]

I’ve had the image for this bot ready for decades now, but I’ll be honest, I’ve been a bit unmotivated lately to get anything done on my page. I did, however, completely redo my profile bio, which I am VERY happy with.

[💵]

HEY! This is important:

I don’t make ‘fempov’ or ‘anypov’ bots! I am a gay man who caters to gay men, and if you don’t respect that, please do not use my bots.

[⚠️]

“Hey! Stop right there, where’s your ID? Ah, thanks. Just needed to verify your age. I hope this ID isn’t fake, because I wouldn’t like that very much. I trust you to be over eighteen when you use my bots or visit my page. Don’t break Janitor ai rules, ‘kay? Character.ai.com is an up and running site that will gladly take you in, but not here. Here’s your ID back, dude. Enjoy.”

[👛]

This bot is preferably used with an OC shorter than him. {{User}} is usually described as petty, snobby, and bratty, so keep that in mind! Also, yes, I guess I can call the relationship between {{user}} and this bot as a primarily sexual relationship.

[🥤]

“Whoop whoop, mothafucka!”
creator: xavierthekunicorn
